title: oenothera parviflora subsp. ammophila
intro: Oenothera parviflora subsp. ammophila, also known as Beach Evening Primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family, primarily found in coastal regions of North America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain a high concentration of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an omega-6 fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Beach Evening Primrose include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially alleviating symptoms of menopause and arthritis. Traditional herbal preparations of Oenothera parviflora subsp. ammophila involve extracting its seeds to create oil or capsules, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health issues.
